title: What is NTUSER.DAT?
problem: Found a weird 20MB file in my user folder. Can I delete it?
command: DO NOT DELETE. It holds your profile's registry settings. Hide it: View Tab > Uncheck 'Hidden items'.
tags: windows files registry hidden settings

title: Flush DNS Cache
problem: Internet is connected but websites won't load or are showing outdated versions.
command: Windows: ipconfig /flushdns | Mac: sudo dscacheutil -flushcache
tags: network internet dns flush wifi

title: Undo Last Commit (Keep Changes)
problem: I committed too early or made a typo in the message, but I don't want to lose my code.
command: git reset --soft HEAD~1
tags: git github version control undo commit soft

title: Repair Corrupted System Files
problem: Windows is crashing, acting weird, or throwing random blue screens.
command: Open CMD as Admin and type: sfc /scannow
tags: windows crash repair sfc scannow blue screen bsod

title: Nuke and Rebuild Database
problem: Database architecture changed and I need to wipe it clean and run all migrations and seeders from scratch.
command: php artisan migrate:fresh --seed
tags: php laravel database migrate seed reset backend

title: Start OWASP ZAP via Docker
problem: Need to run dynamic application security testing (DAST) without installing Java locally.
command: docker run -u zap -p 8080:8080 -i owasp/zap2docker-stable zap.sh -daemon -host 0.0.0.0 -port 8080
tags: security zap owasp dynamic analysis testing docker

title: Find What is Using a Port
problem: Trying to start a server but getting 'Port 8000 is already in use'.
command: lsof -i :8000
tags: linux mac port localhost server error in use network

title: Disable Fast Startup (Fixes Hardware Bugs)
problem: Laptop battery drains while off, or Bluetooth/Wi-Fi drivers fail to load on boot.
command: Control Panel > Power Options > Choose what power buttons do > Uncheck 'Turn on fast startup'.
tags: windows settings power battery boot hardware bluetooth

title: Clean Install Dependencies
problem: Node modules are corrupted or packages aren't updating correctly.
command: rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
tags: react node npm modules install broken dependencies frontend

title: Run SonarQube Scanner
problem: Need to push local source code to SonarQube for static analysis and code smell detection.
command: sonar-scanner.bat -D"sonar.projectKey=my_project" -D"sonar.sources=."
tags: security sonarqube static analysis code smell scan

title: Check and Repair Disk Errors
problem: Hard drive is making weird noises, files are corrupted, or Windows is very slow.
command: Open CMD as Admin: chkdsk C: /f /r /x
tags: windows cmd disk repair chkdsk hard drive storage slow

title: Repair Windows Image (DISM)
problem: SFC scan failed to fix corrupted files, or Windows updates are stuck.
command: Open CMD as Admin: DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /RestoreHealth
tags: windows cmd repair dism update corrupted system

title: Generate Battery Health Report
problem: Laptop battery drains too fast and I want to see its maximum capacity vs original capacity.
command: Open CMD: powercfg /batteryreport
tags: windows cmd laptop battery power report health

title: See All Active Network Ports
problem: Need to know what background programs are using the internet or blocking a development port.
command: Open CMD: netstat -ano
tags: windows cmd network ports netstat internet listening

title: Force Kill a Frozen Program
problem: A program is completely frozen and Task Manager won't close it.
command: Open CMD: taskkill /F /IM program_name.exe (e.g., taskkill /F /IM chrome.exe)
tags: windows cmd frozen crash taskkill close force

title: Test Internet Connection Stability
problem: Internet feels laggy, need to check for packet loss or high ping.
command: Open CMD: ping 8.8.8.8 -t (Press Ctrl+C to stop)
tags: windows cmd internet ping network lag wifi

title: Find Network Routing Issues
problem: A specific website is down but others work. Need to see where the connection drops.
command: Open CMD: tracert google.com
tags: windows cmd network traceroute drop routing website

title: Get Computer Uptime and Specs
problem: Need to quickly check the OS version, RAM, or how long the PC has been running.
command: Open CMD: systeminfo
tags: windows cmd specs ram uptime version systeminfo

title: Find MAC Address (Physical Address)
problem: Need to whitelist the laptop on a secure network or router.
command: Open CMD: getmac /v
tags: windows cmd mac address network physical whitelist router

title: Detailed IP Configuration
problem: Need to find my local IP address, Subnet Mask, or Default Gateway.
command: Open CMD: ipconfig /all
tags: windows cmd ip gateway subnet network local router

title: Show File Extensions
problem: Can't tell if a file is an image.png or a dangerous image.png.exe.
command: File Explorer > View Tab > Check 'File name extensions'.
tags: windows settings file extension hidden security virus

title: Edit System Environment Variables (Path)
problem: Installed Node, Git, or PHP, but the terminal says the command is not recognized.
command: Start Menu > Type 'Environment Variables' > Click 'Environment Variables...' > Edit 'Path'.
tags: windows settings environment variables path developer terminal

title: Disable Startup Applications
problem: Laptop takes 5 minutes to boot up because Spotify, Steam, and Skype launch automatically.
command: Ctrl+Shift+Esc (Task Manager) > 'Startup apps' tab > Right-click and 'Disable'.
tags: windows settings startup boot slow task manager apps

title: Change DNS Server (Faster Browsing)
problem: ISP's default DNS is blocking websites or resolving them very slowly.
command: Settings > Network & Internet > Wi-Fi > Hardware Properties > Edit DNS > Use 8.8.8.8 and 8.8.4.4
tags: windows settings dns network internet fast google

title: Enable Clipboard History
problem: Copied a new link and lost the password I copied 5 minutes ago.
command: Press Win + V > Click 'Turn on'. (Now you can see your last 25 copied items!).
tags: windows settings clipboard copy paste history shortcut

title: Create a System Restore Point
problem: About to edit the registry or install sketchy software and need a safety net.
command: Start Menu > Type 'Create a restore point' > Click 'Create...'
tags: windows settings backup restore point safety registry

title: Clear Temporary System Files
problem: C: Drive is completely full for no reason.
command: Press Win + R > Type '%temp%' > Press Enter > Delete everything in that folder.
tags: windows settings storage temp clear full drive space

title: Enable God Mode
problem: Tired of digging through menus to find advanced admin settings.
command: Create a new folder on Desktop. Name it: GodMode.{ED7BA470-8E54-465E-825C-99712043E01C}
tags: windows settings god mode admin control panel advanced

title: Boot into Safe Mode
problem: Installed a bad graphics driver and now the screen is just black upon booting.
command: Hold 'Shift' while clicking 'Restart' from the Start Menu > Troubleshoot > Advanced Options > Startup Settings.
tags: windows settings safe mode boot crash driver black screen

title: Enable Developer Mode
problem: Need to sideload applications or use advanced Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) features.
command: Settings > Privacy & security > For developers > Toggle 'Developer Mode' On.
tags: windows settings developer mode wsl sideload apps
